title: Better Contraption Diagram
body:
# Better Contraption Diagram
**Precision engineering for Create: Aeronautics**

This mod revamps the Contraption Diagram UI, giving you the extra data you need to build perfectly balanced aircraft. No more guessing why your ship is tilting — now you have the numbers.

## Preview

### CoM Targeting Tool

<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/yGaHgkrkmzc" title="Проигрыватель YouTube" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

### In Game Preview with "_Counterbalancing Helper_"

<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/nX1PpjTCweQ" title="Проигрыватель YouTube" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>


## Key Features:
*   **CoM Targeting Tool:** A specialized screen where you can set a "target" Center of Mass. The mod calculates exactly where and how much weight you need to add to achieve it.
*   **Counterbalancing Helper:** Easily identify and match block pairs with opposite CoM offsets to keep your build stable.
*   

### Extra Features:

*   **Extra Force Data:** Displays precise force direction coordinates and the resultant force vector.
* **In-world block CoM:** Highlights the Center of Mass of the specific block you are looking at (requires _Engineer's Goggles_ and _F3_ menu to be active).
